title: Authenticity Alignment
description: Affirms when words, plans, and embodied signals align, showing coherence between narrative, intention, and authentic response.
indicators: Leader’s words and actions remain consistent across time and situations
Spontaneous reactions reinforce rather than contradict stated plans
Micro-expressions and body language congruent with spoken commitments
Public narrative reflects genuine continuity instead of requiring heavy spin
